title: T-020 — GET /api/scheduler/forecasts (filter + pagination)
prompt:
# T-020 — GET /api/scheduler/forecasts (filter + pagination)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 GET /api/scheduler/forecasts
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement GET endpoint for forecasts list with filters ?product_id=&week_from=&week_to=&source= and pagination (default 50/page).

## Implementation contract
1. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/forecasts/route.ts`: GET with Zod-validated query params.
2. Returns only current rows (superseded_at IS NULL) by default; ?include_superseded=true returns full history.
3. RBAC: Planner Advanced + NPD Manager (own products only — V-SCHED-09 P2 retention applies as filter, not 422).
4. Single Drizzle query with composable filters; uses idx_demand_forecasts_current.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/forecasts/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/forecasts/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 30 forecasts (10 current + 20 superseded), when GET without include_superseded runs, then 10 current rows returned
2. Given GET ?include_superseded=true, when called, then 30 rows returned
3. Given NPD Manager role, when GET runs, then only forecasts where product_id IN NPD scope are returned (filter, not 403)

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts covering filter + supersession + RBAC scope filter
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/forecasts'

## Risk red lines
- Do not return superseded forecasts by default (audit-only opt-in)
- Do not return 403 for NPD Manager (their scope is filter-limited, not auth-blocked)
- Do not skip pagination (10k rows would break Gantt linking)

pipeline_inputs.description: List forecasts with filters, default current-only, include_superseded opt-in, NPD scope filter, pagination 50/page.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single Drizzle query with composable WHERE filters keyed off the partial index idx_demand_forecasts_current. NPD Manager scope acts as filter on product_id, not auth block.
out_of_scope: Do not implement override forecast cell endpoint (P2, separate task)
Do not implement Prophet retrain trigger here (T-062)
